---
title: 'The Rock - Anaheim, CA'
date: '2012-05-24T04:38:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Church Finder'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7262263954420721121'
blogger_filename: '/2012/05/rock-anaheim.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Church Finder/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'California'
---

<div style="text-align: justify;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
</div>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
The Rock – Anaheim

A four square church.<br />
Jerry Dirmann - Senior Pastor<br />
<div>
Kimberly Dirmann - Co-Pastor&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
<br />
<a href="http://www.anaheim.solidlives.com/">http://www.anaheim.solidlives.com/</a>
</div>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
<br />
<br />
<div>
&nbsp;295 E. Orangethorpe Ave. Anaheim, CA 92801&nbsp;</div>
<br />
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
Our mission is to build solid lives – and that starts with the individual. We believe that YOUR life will be revolutionized when you find out the Truth of God’s Word.

No matter where you are in life, there’s a place for you at The Rock! Our services are designed with something for all ages. We would love the opportunity to share God’s love with you.

Join us this weekend!&nbsp;
</div>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: justify;">
<br /></div>
